generated_oml:
instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system composed of styrofoam box enclosure, resistive heatbed, and cooling fan"
    base:contains DS18S20_Thermometer1, DS18S20_Thermometer2, Heatbed, Fan
]

instance DS18S20_Thermometer1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer deployed inside styrofoam box for digital temperature readings via 1-Wire protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData1
]

instance DS18S20_Thermometer2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer deployed inside styrofoam box for digital temperature readings via 1-Wire protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData2
]

instance TemperatureData1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20_Thermometer1
]

instance TemperatureData2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20_Thermometer2
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time thermal data from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData1, TemperatureData2
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4, ScipyOptimizer
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design (CAD) representations of physical components like chassis shapes and heatbed dimensions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4, ScipyOptimizer
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations for thermal dynamics analysis of styrofoam box and heatbed"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4, ScipyOptimizer
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Embedded controller hardware for system management, sensor data processing, and model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService
]

instance RabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService, PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance ScipyOptimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package implementing numerical optimization algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance MOSFETs : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Power delivery control components for heatbed regulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system safety and performance through sensor data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, PerformanceMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulations to reproduce and forecast physical behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides ForecastingInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational parameters via algorithmic optimizers"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalParameterInsight, HeatbedPowerAdjustment
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection and diagnosis using specialized detectors"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, FaultAction
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation to infer unmeasured variables"
    DTDFVocab:provides UnmeasuredVariableInsight
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time assessment of system safety against predefined thresholds"
]

instance PerformanceMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous evaluation of system performance metrics"
]

instance ForecastingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis of future system behavior based on current conditions"
]

instance OptimalParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommended operational parameters for optimal system performance"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection and diagnosis of system faults"
]

instance UnmeasuredVariableInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated values of variables not directly measured by sensors"
]

instance HeatbedPowerAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of heatbed power based on optimization results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated intervention to address detected faults"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Resistive heatbed for heating the styrofoam box interior"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cooling fan for distributing heat within the styrofoam box"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates calibration algorithms to dynamically update physical system models with parameter estimates derived from sensor data, employs monitoring components to validate safety and operational performance, and coordinates human or algorithmic decision-making to initiate corrective actions on the Physical Twin upon anomaly detection, thereby maintaining synchronization between cyber and physical domains through continuous model refinement and feedback loops."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update model parameters with best estimates from sensor data; monitors validate system performance against safety and optimality criteria; detected violations trigger corrective actions via human intervention or automated algorithms."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Monitors within the Digital Twin system check the Physical Twin's safety and optimal performance; upon detecting violations, humans or algorithms (e.g., fault detectors, supervisory controllers) adjust the Physical Twin to maintain safety."
]
